case_title: DEFINITIVE HEALTHCARE, LLC. VS. INFOEDGE LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEFINITIVE HEALTHCARE, LLC. DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF CALCULATION OF INTEREST (TRANSACTION ID # 100036960) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEFINITIVE HEALTHCARE, LLC. A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INFOEDGE LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $19,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,200.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,709.59 INTEREST, $430.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $22,839.59, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100036960)
